villages.name: Monterosso al Mare
villages.description: The only one with a proper sandy beach and resort vibe.

villages.name: Vernazza
villages.description: The crown jewel with a stunning harbor and castle ruins.

villages.name: Corniglia
villages.description: Perched high on the cliffs, quiet and authentic.

villages.name: Manarola
villages.description: Famous for its colorful houses tumbling down to the sea.

villages.name: Riomaggiore
villages.description: The first stop from La Spezia, vibrant and dramatic.
